title: Whitelist
description: This plugin adds a custom, permission-based whitelist to your server!
body:
This plugin adds a custom, permission based whitelist to your server.

Features:
- config: 
  - whitelist status (boolean) - default false
  - whitelist kick message (string) **with minimessage support** - default "This server has whitelist enabled!"
  - whitelist bypass permission (string) - default "whitelist.bypasswhitelist"
- /whitelist command
  - toggle
    - toggle whitelist status
  - reload
    - reload config
  - message
    - set new whitelist kick message

Any questions? Ask me on Discord "jalppa".
